title: crepidorhopalon alatocalycinus
intro: Crepidorhopalon alatocalycinus, also known as the 'globe-flowered cridorrhopalon', is a species of succulent plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to be used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to soothe and protect wounds. The health benefits of Crepidorhopalon alatocalycinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or by using them in a topical salve or cream.
